name: Draft Magnuson-Moss return/warranty claim
summary: Generate a return or warranty-claim letter citing the user's Magnuson-Moss rights.

evidence.claim: Magnuson-Moss permits private civil actions with attorney-fee recovery for consumers seeking warranty enforcement.

body.description: Generate a plain-language return/warranty letter with the user's details, product, defect description, and relevant Magnuson-Moss citations. User reviews and sends.

User has described the defect or issue.

template.subject: Warranty / return claim — {product_name}
